entries.title: 2-tier verification architecture
entries.decision: Tier 1 (API verify, no clone) for bulk triage. Tier 2 (full clone + 5-agent) for high-star skills.

entries.title: Three-party verification separation
entries.decision: VM runs, SM reviews, PM approves. No single role can both execute and approve.

entries.title: Scoring formula fix priority
entries.decision: Formula 100 - min(40,penalty) - 15*b_missed makes large repos mathematically unable to pass. #1 pipeline fix needed.

entries.title: PM_VERIFIED_ORGS auto-clear
entries.decision: 48 trusted orgs auto-clear when injection count <= 3. Mitigates structural FPs from full-repo skills.

entries.title: SM self-evolve loop
entries.decision: SM learns from each verification run via sm_evolve.py. Updates structured memory with tag analysis, quality metrics, FP patterns.

entries.title: SM selection MANDATORY before VM execution
entries.description: VM must NEVER self-select verification targets. SM must select via sm_select_targets.py --output-ids, then VM receives --skill-ids. Prior batches 1-7 used VM load_candidates() (star-sorted, not random, but bypassed SM). Enforced 2026-03-04.

entries.title: Unified priority: stars + installs for SM selection
entries.description: SM selection uses priority_score() = max(stars, installs). MCP skills prioritized by GitHub stars, agent skills by skillsmp install counts. Both signals indicate real usage. Extracted installs from tags into proper field for 4,801 agent skills.

entries.title: SM --type filter: separate MCP vs agent catalog targeting
entries.description: sm_select_targets.py --type mcp|agent allows SM to target one catalog exclusively. Required because agent skills use installs (not stars), have different tier thresholds, and have dramatically different coverage gaps. Without --type, mixed batches under-serve agent catalog. Use --type agent until agent A-tier reaches 50%+ coverage.

entries.title: S-tier 100% complete — first tier milestone
entries.description: As of 2026-03-05, all S-tier skills are verified: 35 MCP (10K+ stars) + 158 agent (100K+ installs) = 193 total. This is the first tier to reach 100% coverage. Validates the agent-first verification strategy. Next target: A-tier agent skills (10K–100K installs, ~1% coverage, 4/394 verified).

entries.title: Phase 1A: Agent-first API reconstruction
entries.description: Executed Phase 1A of the agent-first API reconstruction plan. Key changes: (1) Unified priority scoring max(stars, installs) in build_json.py + build_priority.py — agent skills now tier by installs, MCP by stars. (2) Fixed VerifiedSkill schema bug — skill_type and installs fields were missing, causing all agent skills to be misclassified as MCP servers. (3) Built api/v2/meta/ with 6 lightweight files (70KB vs 4.5MB — 61x reduction). (4) Restructured entry.md for progressive disclosure (cheapest path first). (5) Updated agent.json to v2.0. Total token cost for agent catalog browse: 18K (was 1.1M).
